titleStmt.title: SII 42.78: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 78. (A.R. No. B. 34 of 1954-55.) Nellore, Nellore Taluk, Nellore District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: To the right of the entrance into the main shrine in the Vēṇugōpālasvāmin temple.
Dates: (i) Śaka 1828, Viśvāvasu, Kārttika, śu. 13, Thursday, A.D. 1906. (Late inscription).
(ii) Śaka 1847, Raktākshi, Vaiśākha, śu. 1, Sunday, A.D. 1925. (Late inscription).

States that Śrī-Nārāyaṇa-Rāmanuja-Jīyar of the Yadugiri-Yatirāja-maṭha of Tirunārāyaṇapuram-Mēlukōṭa in Mahisūrarājya in Karnāṭa-maṇḍala, established by Srī Rāmānujachārya, on his return from pilgrimage to Badarikāśrama in the north, having camped at Siṁhapuram alias Nellūru, worshipped god Vēṇugōpālasvāmin consecrated in Mūlasthānēśvarapēṭa (Mūlapēṭa) and established certain practices according to the Pāñcharātr-āgama in the temple and that Saṁpatkumāra-Rāmānuja-jīyar, the fourth pontiff after the former, visited the place, while on a pilgrimage to the north in the Śaka year 1847, Raktākshi, Vaiśākha, śu. 1, Sunday, received the honours due to him from the maṭha established there by his predecessor and ordered the recording of this inscription on stone. The signatures of the Dharmakarttas are appended below the inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: Figures of discus, tīrunāmam and conch.

kṛṣṇāya yādavēṁdrāya jñānamudrāya yōginē [.] nā
thāya rukmiṇīśāya namō vēdāṁtavēdinē .
svasti śrī śakavarṣaṁbulu 1828 viśvāvasu saṁvatsara
kārtīka śuklatrayōdaśī guruvāramaṁdu karnāṭamaṁḍalu A little space is left out before this word.
mahīsūra rājyāṁtargatamaina tirunārāyaṇapuraṁ
(mēlukōṭa) śrīnārāyaṇasvāmi sarvavidha kaiṁkarya nirvāhaBrackets are found in the inscription, as this is an inscription of 20th
mu koraku śrīrāmānujācāryulavāri valana prati
ṣṭhacēyabaḍina śrīparakāra(la)muni saṁpradāyaniṣṭhamaina
śrī yedugiri yetirājamaṭhādhipatulaina śrīma
dvēdamārga pratiṣṭhāpanācārya śrīmatparamahāṁsa Commas are found in the inscription, as this is an inscription of 20th
parivrājakācārya Ityādi birudāṁkitulaina śrīCommas are found in the inscription, as this is an inscription of 20th
yedugiri nārāyaṇa rāmānuja jiyyar svāmu
lavāru (badarikāśrama) Uttarayātra cēsukoni vaccu saBrackets are found in the inscription, as this is an inscription of 20th
mayamuna vu(U)ttara pinākinī dakṣiṇatīramaṁdu (siṁhapura)
manu nellūrunaku vijayaṁcēsi yiccaṭa mūlasthānēśvaruA little space is left out before this word.
nipēṭalō pratiṣṭhitamaiyunna śrī vēṇugōpālasvāmivāri
ki śrīpāṁcarātra Āgamānusāramuga prōkṣaṇādulanu jaripi
divyadēśa saṁbaṁda(dha)muna nērpariṁci(raci) maṁgaḷāśāsanamu cēsi Āḷvā
r Ācārya śē(sē)vāpūrvakamuga tīrthaparigrahamu
cēsināru dānikoraku Ī dēvasthānamunaṁdu A
gratīrthamu modalaina sarvamaryādalērpaḍi modaṭi Adhyā
pakamūlamurā(gā) Ā maṭhamunaku jarugucu vaccinadi
Āsvāmula venuka nālagava paṭta(ṭṭa)muna sāṁprataṁ vila
sillucuṁḍu śrīmadvēdamārga śrīmatparamahaṁsa pa
rivrājikācāryētyādi birudāṁkitamulugala śrī yadugiri ya
tirāja saṁpatkumāra rāmānuja jiyyar svāmulavā
ruttaradēśa yātrārthamu mārgavaśamuna svasti śrī śakavarṣaṁ
bulu 1847 yaina raktākṣi saṁvatsaraṁ vaiśākha śuddha pradha(tha)
mi bhānuvāraṁ Iccaṭa vijayaṁcēsi śrī vēṇugōpālasvā
mi dēvālayamulō [Ē]rpaḍiyuṁḍu tama maṭha pūrva ma
ryādalanu svīkariṁci maṁgaḷāśāsanamonariṁci Ājñacē
sina prakāraṁ Ī śilāśāsanamu stā(sthā)piṁpabaḍinadi
Ī dēvastā(sthā)naṁbunakunnū śrī yadugiri yatirāja
maṭhamunakunnu yērpaḍina saṁbaṁda(dha)munu śāśvata
muga naḍupucunnāramu
dharmakartalu
śabdāḍireḍi raṁgāreḍḍigāru
nara narasāreḍḍigāru
Āmajaga śī(sī)tārāmareḍḍigāru
rātumulūru śivarāmayyagāru
gōviṁdareḍḍigāru
Digital edition of SII 42.78 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
